title: Convert temporary_assigns+phx-update=append to streams
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/log_stream_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.LogStreamLive) that replaces the pre-stream idiom (temporary_assigns: [log_entries: []] + phx-update="append") with the modern streams pattern. mount/3 must NOT declare temporary_assigns. It should call stream(:log_entries, []) and render <div id="logs" phx-update="stream"> iterating @streams.log_entries. A handle_info({:log, entry}, ...) clause must stream_insert the entry.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing pre-stream idiom and replacing both the opts and the phx-update attribute.
